key.name: codexbar-bin
key.description: Full path to the codexbar CLI executable

key.name: poll-interval
key.description: How often to poll codexbar for usage data (300–3600 seconds)

key.name: provider-codex-enabled
key.description: Whether to poll and display Codex usage

key.name: provider-claude-enabled
key.description: Whether to poll and display Claude usage

key.name: provider-gemini-enabled
key.description: Whether to poll and display Gemini usage

key.name: display-mode
key.description: Panel display: 'text' for labels, 'icons' for SVG icons
